title: PortableStorage Rift
description: A private, freely accessible dimensional space that allows entry and exit at will.
body:
# The Rift

The rift functionality extracted from [Portable Storage](https://github.com/LoosePrince/portable-storage) and made standalone.

In addition to the originally supported Fabric, Forge support has also been added.

The crafting recipe for the rift key is as follows: place a Nether Star in the second slot of the first row, place a Dragon Egg in the second slot of the second row, and fill the remaining seven slots with Diamond Blocks.

----

# 裂隙

从 [Portable Storage](https://github.com/LoosePrince/portable-storage) 中提取的裂隙功能，并独立出来。

除了原本支持的fabric外，还额外支持forge。

裂隙钥匙的合成配方为，在第一行的第二格摆放下届之星，在第二行的第二格摆放龙蛋，剩余七格摆放钻石块。
